Let's Connect

The Agent-First Brokerage

Meet Lifstyl

Income

Keep More of your hard-earned commissions

We're redefining the old, inefficient real estate model. With flexible commissions, leading tools and unparalleled training, our agent-centric brokerage gives you the environment to flourish in real estate. This is not just another brokerage. It's a lifstyl.

Business

Succeed with powerful branding and marketing tools

Every agent benefits from our Lifstyl branding, including a website, logos, and business cards. You'll also have access to branded, impactful marketing materials for your presentations and listings. Access to cutting-edge tools like Brokermint, Placester and Canva Pro at no cost to the agent. and DotLoop help you acquire and close leads - better than ever.

Growth

Thrive with leading training and mentorship

If you're just starting out, you'll have direct access to our Mentorship Program. This gives you one-on-one training with some of the industry's most experienced Realtors®. Have a question? Just get in touch with us - our agent support runs 24/7.

Culture

Feel at home in our inclusive community

We're more than a brokerage. We're a community. Lifstyl has created a tight-knit group of like-minded real estate professionals united by our shared values and a hunger for growth and self-improvement.

Work Remotely or from three beautiful community centers

With streamlined, cloud-based systems, working remotely has never been easier. But if you feel like working from our local offices we have a beautiful space in Lexington, KY

Modern spaces designed for productivity

Our community centers are equipped with everything you need to meet clients and close deals in style.

Collaborate with a community of driven agents

Work alongside like-minded professionals who share your ambition and drive.

Premium amenities at your fingertips

Conference rooms, high-speed internet, and professional environments ready when you need them.

Your success is our priority

Every space is designed to help you perform at your best, every single day.

Want to Partner With Us?

We are looking for local Equity Partners who want to leverage our local brand presence with scalable growth. As a Lifstyl Equity Partner, you receive access to our strategy, systems, tools, and shared resources minus the large capital outlay.
